paper_title: Materials and Methods of Bee Pollen Analysis

methods.description: Process for preparing and analyzing bee pollen samples for qualitative evaluation, including homogenization, ultrasonic treatment, and slide preparation.

steps.description: Two grams of dried pollen were homogenized in 70% alcohol, subjected to ultrasonic bath for 5 min, and centrifuged.
steps.searchable_summary: homogenize pollen in alcohol, apply ultrasonic bath, and centrifuge

steps.description: Samples were washed in water and water-glycerin, mounted on slides with gelatin-glycerin in duplicate, sealed with paraffin.
steps.searchable_summary: wash samples, mount on slides, seal with paraffin

methods.description: Procedures for determining water activity, mycobiota, and toxigenic profiles of bee pollen samples.

steps.description: Water activity (A w ) was determined using the AquaLab ® equipment.
steps.searchable_summary: measure water activity using AquaLab equipment

steps.description: Mycobiota determination was performed by counting the number of filamentous fungi in colony-forming units per gram of food after serial dilution plating.
steps.searchable_summary: count filamentous fungi using serial dilution plating

steps.description: 1 mL aliquots of each of the four dilutions were inoculated in three culture media and incubated at 25°C for 5 to 7 days.
steps.searchable_summary: inoculate dilutions in culture media and incubate

steps.description: Fungal colonies of Aspergillus and Penicillium were subcultivated in slanted tubes containing malt extract agar, whereas Fusarium colonies were cultivated in banana leaf agar.
steps.searchable_summary: subcultivate fungal colonies in specific agar media

steps.description: Identification of Aspergillus sp., Penicillium sp., and Fusarium sp. was conducted using specific identification methods.
steps.searchable_summary: identify fungal species using established methods

steps.description: To characterize the toxigenic profile, strains of Aspergillus sections Flavi and Nigri were analyzed.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze toxigenic profile of Aspergillus strains

methods.description: Evaluation of the shelf life of bee pollen samples using sell-by date and date of purchase information.

steps.description: Shelf life evaluation was performed on samples bearing an inspection seal using the sell-by date and date of purchase information.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate shelf life using sell-by date and purchase date
